description.value: Price 4,500 gp; Slot shoulder; CL 5th; Weight 1 lb.; Aura faint abjuration DESCRIPTION These decorative golden braids allow the wearer to cast bless and sanctuary each once per day. They also grant a +2 competence bonus on Diplomacy checks and checks for one other skill, depending on what branch of the Eagle Knights the epaulets are attuned to ( Perception for the Steel Falcons, Ride for the Golden Legion, Swim for the Gray Corsairs, or Stealth for the Twilight Talons). CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 2,250 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells bless, guidance, sanctuary
